pi_items.verified_value: 6 devices listed, but task description requires 7 (missing 'speakers'). All 6 listed devices are real products.
pi_items.source: Web search verified each device: Shure MXA920, Q-SYS Core 8 Flex, Netgear M4250-10G2F-PoE+, Lenovo ThinkSmart Core, Aver CAM520 Pro2, Samsung QM55B

pi_items.verified_value: 3 rules provided, but scope of work defines 6 total connections. Metadata captures critical rules only; missing: pc->switch (network), camera->pc (USB), dsp->speakers (analog audio)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates scope_of_work.txt with 6 documented connections across 4 signal types

pi_items.verified_value: /home/ga/Desktop/av_scope_of_work.txt - setup_task.sh creates this file with PROJECT code CONF-RM-04, dated 2024-05-20
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 17-59 embed full scope content

pi_items.verified_value: Shure MXA920 supports both PoE+ power and Dante audio over Cat5e/Cat6 cabling
pi_items.source: Shure official product page and user guide

pi_items.verified_value: Q-SYS Core 8 Flex supports 8x8 Dante channels, dual Gigabit Ethernet ports, and analog I/O
pi_items.source: QSC official product specifications and documentation

pi_items.verified_value: Aver CAM520 Pro2 uses USB 3.1 Gen1 Type B (USB 3.1 Gen1 is the updated designation for USB 3.0)
pi_items.source: AVer official product specifications and Amazon product listing

pi_items.verified_value: Samsung QM55B is a 55" (54.6" viewable) 4K display with 3840x2160 resolution, 3x HDMI 2.0 ports, 1x DisplayPort 1.2
pi_items.source: Samsung official business product page and specification sheets

pi_items.verified_value: Netgear M4250-10G2F-PoE+ is a 12-port managed switch with 8x1G PoE+ ports, 2x1G ports, 2xSFP, designed for AV over IP with built-in Dante/Q-SYS/AES67 support
pi_items.source: Netgear official product page and technical specifications

pi_items.verified_value: Lenovo ThinkSmart Core is certified for Zoom Rooms, features Intel Core i5 processor, HDMI output, USB ports, LAN connection, Windows IoT Enterprise
pi_items.source: Lenovo official product pages and Zoom hardware certification

privileged_info_summary: All six devices in the metadata are real commercial products designed for professional AV conference rooms. The Shure MXA920 and Q-SYS Core 8 Flex both support Dante networking, the Netgear M4250-10G2F-PoE+ is an AV-specific managed switch with PoE+, the Lenovo ThinkSmart Core is certified for Zoom Rooms with HDMI and USB I/O, the Aver CAM520 Pro2 connects via USB 3.1 Gen1 (not USB 3.0 as stated), and the Samsung QM55B is a 55" 4K display with HDMI connectivity. The metadata incompletely lists required devices (6 instead of 7, missing speakers) and incompletely documents topology rules (3 of 6 connections), though the listed rules capture the critical paths.
